name: @repo/widget
description: Hosted search widget for AACsearch — embeddable storefront search UI with one script tag.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/search-client.ts src/autocomplete-ui.ts --format esm,iife --outDir dist --clean --minify
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts src/search-client.ts src/autocomplete-ui.ts --format esm,iife --outDir dist --watch
